name: CervoMed Inc.
summary: CervoMed Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing treatments for age-related brain disorders. Its lead drug candidate, neflamapimod, is an orally administered small-molecule p38 inhibitor targeting neuroinflammation and synaptic dysfunction. Neflamapimod is in clinical development for Dementia with Lewy Bodies (DLB), nonfluent variant primary progressive aphasia (nfvPPA), Rapid Eye Movement Sleep Behavior Disorder Associated Synucleinopathy (RAS), and ALS. There are no approved therapies for DLB in the US or EU.

products.name: neflamapimod
products.description: Investigational oral small-molecule p38 inhibitor targeting neuroinflammation and synaptic dysfunction in neurodegenerative diseases including DLB, nfvPPA, RAS, and ALS.

partnerships.partner_name: New York University Langone Medical Center
partnerships.description: Collaborative research demonstrating neflamapimod targets molecular mechanisms underlying basal forebrain cholinergic dysfunction in DLB, published in Nature Communications.
UK government and charity-funded platform selected neflamapimod for inclusion to facilitate rapid testing of potential ALS treatments.
